nika:prompt · the human gate
It pauses for a human. Durably.
the gate · run pauses exit 4 · paused
$ nika run signature-gated.nika.yaml --json > gate.ndjson $ echo "exit=$?" nika run: trace: .nika/traces/2026-07-24T14-15-10Z-cfcc.ndjson · 21 events · chain 1d730633b18f19970536fbbb862965bcac77aa3ff087ae49a5b5ce74b13e5770 nika run: resume: nika run signature-gated.nika.yaml --resume .nika/traces/2026-07-24T14-15-10Z-cfcc.ndjson --answer approve=true|false exit=4 $ tail -1 gate.ndjson | jq -r '.kind, (.fields[] | select(.key=="note").value)' workflow_paused awaiting a `nika:prompt` answer — resume with `--resume <trace> --answer <task>=<value>`
the re-arm · --answer approve=true ↷ 5 banked · rc=0
$ nika run signature-gated.nika.yaml --resume gate.ndjson --answer approve=true 🦋 nika · release-notes-i18n-gated · 7 tasks permits ✓ engine floor (no boundary declared) ↷ · discover cache hit (resume) → [5] · 101B ↷ · digest cache hit (resume) → "- feat: nika test — g…" · 324B ↷ · draft cache hit (resume) → "mock(echo) · Draft co…" · 389B ↷ · translate cache hit (resume) → [4] · 1.8KB ↷ · verify cache hit (resume) → "mock(echo) · Review t…" · 2.0KB ✔ ◆ approve invoke · nika:prompt [0ms] → true · 4B ✔ ▷ publish exec · printf [2ms] → "published: release no…" · 32B ── 7/7 done · $0.00 · elapsed 0.0s ───────────────────────────── ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 7/7 ◆ approve ▕█▏ 0ms ▷ publish ▕ ███████████████████████▏ 2ms 0s ······································ 3ms ╭─ nika ✓ release-notes-i18n-gated ────────────────────────╮ │ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ ◆ ⇉ … 7 tasks · 7 waves · 0 re… │ │ 4ms · $0.00 │ │ outputs → receipt (string) │ ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯ explore: nika run signature-gated.nika.yaml --json > run.ndjson · nika trace outputs run.ndjson trace: .nika/traces/2026-07-24T14-15-10Z-16f7.ndjson · 18 events · chain 35321986bec36965092a8834499e7d23384e262c4b300d77313edf85aafa253d resumed · 5 skipped (cache hit) · 2 ran live
